comments.body: @mtrmac @vrothberg would you test this out following https://github.com/golang/go/wiki/Modules on a fresh outside-of-gopath dir? :smile:

@runcom, I prefer to wait until modules are considered stable. It looks like this will happen with the release of go v1.12 which will be released at the end of January + waiting until it's packaged etc.
yes, we're not merging this right now, but we need it tested and report upstream any bug we find.
Adding WIP flag to make sure no one accidentally merges.
@vrothberg Can you take this one over.

> @vrothberg Can you take this one over.

Sure. I will take the crusade also over to libpod and buildah and eventually down to image and storage. But I need some free cycles for that. I am closing this PR in favor of the future one.
